description: Legal document. Concerning a betrothal (qiddushin). Mentions the witnesses Bū ʿAlī b. al-Faḍlī (or al-Faṣlī?) and Ṭayyib al-Ṣayrafī. Early portion of 5 dinars. The transfer of part of a building was executed. The currency is Muʿizzī dinars. Signed by [...] b. Efrayim and [...] b. Ṭoviyya. (Information from Goitein's index card and CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
